chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – Inheritance of the son of the cursed mother (by her husband)

text: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ وَلَدِ الْمُلَاعَنَةِ مَنْ يَرِثُهُ قَالَ أُمُّهُ فَقُلْتُ إِنْ مَاتَتْ أُمُّهُ مَنْ يَرِثُهُ قَالَ أَخْوَالُهُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah, said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a child of the mother cursed (disowned/denied) by her husband, who would inherit him? So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His mother’. So I said, ‘If his mother is dead, who would inherit him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His maternal uncle’.
